# NOVARIS Consulting GmbH

> NOVARIS Consulting is a German consultancy specialized in the Research Allowance (Forschungszulage / FZulG). We guide companies of all industries and sizes through the entire application process for the tax-based R&D incentive – from initial analysis through BSFZ certification to payout by the tax authority.

## Core Expertise

The Research Allowance under the German Research Allowance Act (FZulG) is a tax incentive for research and development (R&D) in Germany. Companies receive up to 25% (SMEs: 35%) of eligible expenditures as a tax credit – up to EUR 4.2 million per year. NOVARIS handles the entire application process on a success-based fee model: no success – no fee.

## Key Facts

- Legal basis: Forschungszulagengesetz (FZulG), § 27a EStG
- Eligible costs: Personnel costs, own contributions, contract research (60%)
- Maximum assessment base: EUR 12 million per year
- Maximum allowance: EUR 4.2 million (SMEs) / EUR 3 million (large enterprises)
- Retroactive claims possible from 01.01.2020
- Industry- and size-independent, no competitive procedure
- Certification body: BSFZ (Bescheinigungsstelle Forschungszulage)
- 100% success rate on BSFZ certifications (NOVARIS)
